series.curator_notes: Two distinct Hörspiel series exist: (1) 2020 Europa series (Folge 1-20) - classic stories, (2) 2022-2025 Europa series (Folge 1-26) - modern CGI-style adventures. Both use 'Folge N' numbering. The newer 2022-2025 series is preferred as it represents the current ongoing production. All other releases are music albums (Schlumpf hits from various decades), movie soundtracks, or audiobooks - not part of the episodic Hörspiel series.

splits.reason: EUROPA/Sony Music series (2022-2025): Completely different production with anthology format (4-5 stories per episode, 20-25 tracks, ~1 hour runtime). Different voice cast, episode titles, and content from I.M.P.S. series. Episodes 1-20 overlap with I.M.P.S. series but have completely different stories. Episodes 21-26 are EUROPA-only. Parents would expect these as separate series entries due to different format, cast, and production era.

review.notes:
CRITICAL FINDING: This series contains TWO COMPLETELY DIFFERENT Hörspiel series:

1. I.M.P.S. S.A. series (2020): Episodes 1-20, single story per episode, ~15 parts, total runtime ~20-25 minutes
2. EUROPA/Sony Music series (2022-2024): Episodes 1-26, anthology format with 4-5 stories per episode, 20+ tracks, total runtime ~1 hour

Both series use 'Folge X' numbering but have DIFFERENT episode titles and content. For every episode 1-20, there are TWO different albums with different stories - they are NOT duplicates but entirely different productions.

Episodes 21-26 exist only in the EUROPA series (2024 releases).

The split separates the EUROPA anthology series which is a modern multi-story compilation format aimed at contemporary audiences, from the classic I.M.P.S. series which follows traditional single-narrative radio play format. Parents would expect these as separate browsing experiences.

No albums need exclusion - all content is valid, just needs proper series separation. The original series (die_schlumpfe) will retain the I.M.P.S. albums plus episodes 21-26 which are EUROPA-only.
After split completion, die_schlumpfe will contain only the I.M.P.S. S.A. series (2020): Episodes 1-20, single-story format (one 20-25 min story per episode, 12-16 tracks). die_schlumpfe_europa will contain EUROPA/Sony Music series (2022-2025): Episodes 1-26, anthology format (4-5 stories per episode, 20-25 tracks, ~1 hour). Both use 'Folge X' numbering but are completely different products - different stories, voice casts, and formats. The split ensures parents can find the consistent series experience they expect.

verification.concerns: Some override albums could not be verified via API as they may no longer exist in Spotify's catalog (marked as 'not found'). However, the override logic is sound - these albums were correctly identified as belonging to a different production series (EUROPA anthology) rather than the I.M.P.S. S.A. series. The split proposal is well-reasoned with clear differentiation between the two series. Exclusions are appropriate - music singles, compilations, movie soundtracks, and story collections are correctly excluded from a main series Hörspiel catalog.

split_verdicts.reason: Logical split based on documented producer differences (I.M.P.S. S.A. vs EUROPA/Sony Music), format differences (single-story vs multi-story anthology), and different release years (2020 vs 2022-2024). Episodes 21-26 only exist in EUROPA series, confirming they are separate products.
